Main
The VLCC Market Steadies Following a Month of Constant Pressure, as a Rare Positive Factor Emerges - The VLCC market remained relatively stable in the final week of June

Bi-Weekly Report
• The VLCC Market Steadies Following a Month of Constant Pressure, as a Rare Positive Factor Emerges - The VLCC market
remained relatively stable in the final week of June, following persistent downward pressure recorded earlier in the month. Downward momentum seems to have slowed down, although the potential for weakening summer demand clouds the
prospect for firmer rates for the time being. On the benchmark Middle East Gulf to China route,
